title: Research Run
description: A research task execution. Status mirrors the MCP task lifecycle (working, completed, failed, cancelled). Progress and report are updated by the worker in real time.

run_status.description: Execution status, mirrors the MCP task status for the underlying run. Distinct from the base entity `status` field which tracks lifecycle (active/archived/deleted).

status_message.description: Short human-readable description of the current phase

report.description: The final markdown report. Populated when status becomes 'completed'.

sources.description: Sources consulted during the research run. Populated incrementally during the 'Gathering sources' phase.

snippet.description: Short excerpt or summary of the source (optional)

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run started

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the run reached a terminal state
